hero.title: Baking Dreams
hero.subtitle: Elevate your celebrations with our bespoke, luxury cakes. Every tier is crafted with the finest ingredients and an artisan's touch.

footer.brand: Handcrafted luxury cakes for your most extraordinary moments. Mutare, Zimbabwe

contact.subheadline: Whether it's a birthday, wedding, or just a sweet craving — we'd love to hear from you.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Creating your perfect cake is easier than you think
howItWorks.seamlessDesc: We've redefined the custom cake experience. Enjoy a stress-free process designed to let you focus on what truly matters—celebrating your special day.

step1.title: Choose Your Design
step1.desc: Browse our artisan collection or request a bespoke design.

step2.title: Place Order
step2.desc: Secure your date with a quick WhatsApp message or direct checkout.

step3.title: White Glove Delivery
step3.desc: We handle the transport and setup so you can simply enjoy.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Crafting sweet memories since 2018
about.content1: Welcome to Tarie Cakes, where every creation tells a story of passion, precision, and unparalleled craftsmanship. Founded in Mutare, Zimbabwe, we specialize in luxury bespoke cakes that transform your celebrations into extraordinary moments.
about.content2: Our master baker combines traditional techniques with contemporary flair, using only the finest ingredients sourced globally to create cakes that are as visually stunning as they are delicious.
